storyboard.content: I have round, scaly patches on my elbows and knees that are really itchy
The patches are covered with silvery-white scales and the skin underneath is red and raised
Sometimes the patches crack and feel tender
The patches first showed up about 8 months ago and have been slowly getting bigger since then
The itching is moderate but really bothers me at night and is hurting my sleep, and I feel embarrassed wearing short sleeves
The patches get worse when I am stressed or during the winter months
There is no sign of infection, open wounds, or spreading to my face or body folds
